tasks.subject: Task 1: snapshot_composer crate — trait + compose() + parity unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New crate exposing `SnapshotSources` (I/O boundary) + `compose()` with the orchestration policy moved verbatim from `balanze_cli::build_snapshot`, fake-sources unit-tested.

**Files:** Create `crates/snapshot_composer/Cargo.toml` + `src/lib.rs` (no reqwest dep).

**Acceptance Criteria:** SnapshotSources trait (4 async fns); compose() reproduces build_snapshot byte-for-byte (oauth→five_hour_reset anchor; JSONL-err single-error rule; Codex/OpenAI Ok(None) no error); fake-sources tests; `#[allow(async_fn_in_trait)]` documented; clippy -D clean.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p snapshot_composer && cargo clippy -p snapshot_composer --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/snapshot_composer/Cargo.toml","crates/snapshot_composer/src/lib.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p snapshot_composer && cargo clippy -p snapshot_composer --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["SnapshotSources trait w/ 4 async fns","compose() reproduces build_snapshot policy byte-for-byte","fake-sources tests cover jsonl-err/codex-none/openai-none/oauth-err-fallback","no reqwest dep","clippy -D warnings clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Repoint balanze_cli onto the composer (no behavior change)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `LiveSources: SnapshotSources` (existing fetch bodies moved unchanged); `build_snapshot()` = `compose(&LiveSources, Utc::now())`; duplicated helpers deleted; behavior unchanged.

**Files:** `crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml` (+snapshot_composer dep); `crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** build_snapshot delegates to compose; LiveSources bodies = current helpers moved unchanged; 2 pure helpers deleted; TODO block rewritten; workspace tests green UNCHANGED (integration not modified here); clippy+fmt clean.

**Verify:** `cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml","crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check","acceptanceCriteria":["build_snapshot delegates to compose(&LiveSources)","LiveSources bodies = current helpers moved unchanged","2 pure helpers deleted; TODO block rewritten","workspace tests green unchanged (integration not modified)","clippy+fmt clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Repoint integration_4quadrant.rs onto compose() (parity guard)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `FixtureSources: SnapshotSources` (fixtures, zero network) + a test asserting the SAME compose() the CLI runs.

**Files:** `crates/balanze_cli/tests/integration_4quadrant.rs` (+ Cargo dev-deps only if compiler needs).

**Acceptance Criteria:** FixtureSources (no network); compose_parity_against_fixtures asserts cost>0/event_count==3/window==3/codex≈17.5/openai None/oauth-err; all pre-existing tests unchanged + green.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p balanze_cli --test integration_4quadrant && cargo test --workspace`

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/balanze_cli/tests/integration_4quadrant.rs","crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p balanze_cli --test integration_4quadrant && cargo test --workspace","acceptanceCriteria":["FixtureSources impl (no network)","compose_parity test asserts documented Snapshot fields","oauth-err ⇒ now-relative window end-to-end","all pre-existing tests unchanged + green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: backoff crate — pure policy + generic retry combinator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure `BackoffPolicy` (standard 30s×2ⁿ cap 10min/6; fail_fast 0; custom) + `RetryDecision` + generic async `retry`, paused-time unit-tested.

**Files:** Create `crates/backoff/Cargo.toml` + `src/lib.rs`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** saturating delay_for_attempt; retry honors server Retry-After clamped to cap + max_retries budget; paused-time deterministic tests; clippy -D clean.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p backoff && cargo clippy -p backoff --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/backoff/Cargo.toml","crates/backoff/src/lib.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p backoff && cargo clippy -p backoff --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["standard/fail_fast/custom + saturating delay_for_attempt","RetryDecision enum","retry honors server Retry-After clamped to cap + max_retries budget","paused-time tests deterministic","clippy -D warnings clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire backoff into anthropic_oauth (CLI passes fail-fast)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetch_usage + refresh_access_token accept &BackoffPolicy, retry transient/429/5xx (honor Retry-After), NEVER retry 401. CLI passes fail_fast(). Workspace compiles per-commit.

**Files:** anthropic_oauth Cargo.toml/types.rs/client.rs/refresh.rs/tests/refresh_wiremock.rs; balanze_cli main.rs+Cargo.toml.

**Acceptance Criteria:** +policy param; 429→RateLimited{retry_after}; classifier never retries 401/non-5xx; 401-no-retry proven by wiremock expect(1); 429-then-200 retry green; CLI fail_fast(); workspace+clippy green.

**Verify:** `cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/anthropic_oauth/Cargo.toml","crates/anthropic_oauth/src/types.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/src/client.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/src/refresh.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/tests/refresh_wiremock.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs","crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["fetch_usage+refresh_access_token gain &BackoffPolicy param","429→RateLimited w/ Retry-After; never retries 401/non-5xx","401 no-retry proven by wiremock expect(1)","429-then-200 retry test green","CLI passes fail_fast()","workspace+clippy green per-commit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wire backoff into openai_client (CLI passes fail-fast)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetch_costs/costs_this_month accept &BackoffPolicy, retry transient/429/5xx, NEVER retry 401/403. CLI passes fail_fast().

**Files:** openai_client Cargo.toml/types.rs/client.rs/tests/wiremock_tests.rs; balanze_cli main.rs.

**Acceptance Criteria:** +policy param; 429→RateLimited; classifier never retries 401/403/non-5xx; 429-then-200 green; 403 no-retry proven; CLI fail_fast(); workspace+clippy+fmt clean.

**Verify:** `cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/openai_client/Cargo.toml","crates/openai_client/src/types.rs","crates/openai_client/src/client.rs","crates/openai_client/tests/wiremock_tests.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check","acceptanceCriteria":["costs_this_month+fetch_costs gain &BackoffPolicy param","429→RateLimited; never retries 401/403/non-5xx","429-then-200 green; 403 no-retry proven","CLI passes fail_fast()","workspace+clippy+fmt clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Docs — AGENTS.md Repo Map / §2 / §4 #8 + prd.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Keep authoritative docs truthful (§8): Repo Map +2 crates, §2 YAGNI updated, §4 #8 marked extracted, prd Track-B-shipped note.

**Files:** AGENTS.md; docs/prd.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Repo Map +snapshot_composer +backoff lines (no sibling reflow); §2 YAGNI sentence updated; §4 #8 rewritten past-tense citing the parity test, YAGNI clause dropped; prd Phase 2 Track B shipped note; no unrelated reflow.

**Verify:** `rg -n 'snapshot_composer|crates/backoff' AGENTS.md && git diff --stat AGENTS.md docs/prd.md`

```json:metadata
{"files":["AGENTS.md","docs/prd.md"],"verifyCommand":"rg -n 'snapshot_composer|crates/backoff' AGENTS.md && git diff --stat AGENTS.md docs/prd.md","acceptanceCriteria":["Repo Map +2 crate lines, no sibling reflow","§2 YAGNI sentence updated","§4 #8 rewritten past-tense, parity test cited, YAGNI clause dropped","prd Phase 2 Track B shipped note","no unrelated reflow"]}
```
